title: Sadiq Khan accuses Donald Trump of spreading 'lies and propaganda' as Mayor reignites vicious feud
tags: cited data showing that London had recorded its lowest number of homicides per capita since records began;decline in phone-snatching;Sadiq Khan's car ban plan under fire as London Mayor faces backlash over costs;Sadiq Khan accused of 'politicising Islam' amid calls to ban public prayer - 'Creating division!';Sadiq Khan demands Brexit be reversed - and wants to rejoin the EU without even holding a referendum;telling Britain's News Channel he was a "disaster" and a "nasty person";families had to be barricaded inside shops after mobs of youths descended on a leafy suburb of the capital following an online trend;The GB News Editorial Charter
